'''Gottu''', along with [[Idow]], was an urban combat specialist of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Judder Page/Legends|Judder Page's]] special forces team called the [[Katarn Commandos]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he was one of the commandos assigned to infiltrate [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] to bring down the planetary shields so that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] could [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberate]] the planet. During the mission, he carried an [[A280-K blaster rifle]] and a [[Vibro-ax/Legends|vibro-ax]].

{{Char-stub}}
